hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.test\.|\.spec\.|node_modules'; then echo 'Reminder: run `pnpm tsc --noEmit` and `pnpm biome check .` from app/ before declaring done.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'supabase/migrations/.*\.sql$'; then echo 'Reminder: this is a migration. Run: cd app && pnpm dlx supabase db push && pnpm db:types && commit the regenerated database.types.ts. Never push to prod manually — the GitHub branching integration handles it.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'src/app/api/.*route\.(ts|tsx)$'; then echo 'Reminder: route handlers should only parse/auth/call-lib/respond. If business logic crept in, move it to src/lib/. See docs/decisions/0007-lib-discipline.md.'; fi
